description: 8 TSR N T e SRR SR S U IS S RBl T R T SNI e o 7R By ROBERT S ALLEN and PAUL SCOTT S WASHINGTONThere is solid proof that the North Vietnamese Communist attack on South Vietnam has entered a new and much graver phase At least four regular regiments of the North Vietnamese army including the 803rd and 804th regiments of the 324th division Dow are operating on South Vietnam territory Thats the dark heart of the foreboding report General Paul D Harkins who is running the US military show in Viet Nam i has given Defense Secretary Robert McNamara and General i Maxwell D Taylor chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff In addition General Harkins warned that intelligence obtained from ground observers and air reconnaissance indicates the Presence near Kontum capital of South Vietnams most exposed border province of two other bodies of Communist troops which are believed to be regiments of regulars These groups not precisely identifiable since no prisoners have been taken and no documents have been captured are known to be using elephant and air transport presumably for weapons heavier than the light guerrilla armament Air reconnaissance has confirmed a seventh
